entries.note: V65-C reuses the shipped V65-A delegated export packet and shipped V65-B reconciliation report by default.
V65-C adds only one advisory delegated-worker hardening register and does not mint export or reconciliation authority.
Committed shipped artifacts remain the authoritative evidence basis over review prose in V65-C.
V65-C keeps one explicit frozen-policy anchor for replayable delegated-worker hardening.
If reconciliation-local basis is absent, worker-result-local evidence may not be overread; if present, it must remain consistent or fail closed.
One selected released worker carrier/topology/result lineage remains path-local only and does not generalize into broader V48 worker-law or alternate carrier/topology selection.
Shipped V64-C writable-surface hardening evidence remains shaping or drift-guard context only, not delegated export or reconciliation entitlement.
Allowed V65-C candidate outcomes remain non-entitling, non-escalating, and scope-bound to later locked follow-ons.
The selected delegated path remains exact and non-generalizing by default into all-repo, shell, execute, dispatch, multi-worker, connector, or remote law.
